raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general section review centrally includes checking whether the argument moves coherently from motivation to benchmark results to conclusion.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about bias reduction and metric improvements, so review must assess whether those claims are supported by the reported results.","R1.6":"Reviewing a prose section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.","RX.1":"The projection must account for uncertainty because the delegation is broad and the artifact provides only the section text, not surrounding paper context.","RX.2":"The section contains strong causal and generality claims, so avoiding unsupported overclaiming is an active responsibility.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits, rewriting, or expanding the artifact.","RX.4":"Because the artifact concerns scientific performance claims, review should avoid enabling misleading downstream interpretations.","RX.5":"Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general section review centrally includes checking whether the argument moves coherently from motivation to benchmark results to conclusion.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about bias reduction and metric improvements, so review must assess whether those claims are supported by the reported results.
rationale.R1.6: Reviewing a prose section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, concision, and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must account for uncertainty because the delegation is broad and the artifact provides only the section text, not surrounding paper context.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong causal and generality claims, so avoiding unsupported overclaiming is an active responsibility.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than executing edits, rewriting, or expanding the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact concerns scientific performance claims, review should avoid enabling misleading downstream interpretations.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the specific claims present in the artifact.
